comment: Please just request a quick question.I was trying to edit a video and I found out that there is no option to change text to speech only audio. A l've made sure the app is up to date so I don't know why it's not working. Oh and it would also be nice if everyone had the same editing features. Allowing them on one phone but not other gets really annoying. I am only talking about TikTok editing which other apps can't find to edit clips. My account @aftab.mahar786
key sentence: The key words: TikTok editing features
the function of activity: This activity allows users to record and enhance videos, adjust playback speed, add effects, sound, text, music, and post videos.
the sub-task list of state: [{'name': 'Add Link', 'description': 'Add a link to the post'}, {'name': 'Allow Comments', 'description': 'Toggle on/off the ability for viewers to leave comments on the post'}, {'name': 'Allow Duet', 'description': 'Toggle on/off the ability for viewers to create a duet video with the post'}, {'name': 'Allow Stitch', 'description': 'Toggle on/off the ability for viewers to stitch the post into their own video'}, {'name': 'Post as Template', 'description': 'Option to post the video as a template for others to use and create their own videos'}, {'name': 'Save to Drafts', 'description': 'Save the post as a draft for future editing and posting'}, {'name': 'Post', 'description': 'Finalize and post the video on the platform'}]
